term: In Front and Behind the Camera
englishDefinitions: In acting roles and in production roles; both on screen and in the technical work of making a film.
persianTranslation: هم جلوی دوربین و هم پشت دوربین
هم بازیگری و هم عوامل تولید
examples: She has experience both in front and behind the camera.
The documentary follows people in front and behind the camera.
He enjoys working in front and behind the camera.
